title: Debiapur Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Debiapur with a Z-Score of +5.03. This extreme weather event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Debiapur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 16.6 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 37%, and the wind speed is 4.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
